atoms.semantic_claim: A post-merge chain configured with a custom base block reward credits that custom reward to the block beneficiary after execution.

destinations.snippet: No custom block reward post-merge test found.

atoms.negative_test_candidate: Configure Paris at genesis with base_block_reward(Some(2 ETH)), execute an empty post-merge block, and assert beneficiary balance increases by exactly the configured reward.
atoms.notes: Reviewed: confirmed missing test fixture only. The production custom reward path is covered by ChainSpec/Alloy EVM reward code, but this exact EVM execution regression test is absent.

atoms.semantic_claim: A post-merge chain without custom base block reward does not credit any block reward to the beneficiary after execution.

destinations.evidence: Exact searches for the test name and no-reward beneficiary assertion found no destination match.

atoms.negative_test_candidate: Configure Paris at genesis without base_block_reward, execute an empty post-merge block, and assert beneficiary balance remains unchanged.
atoms.notes: Reviewed: confirmed missing test fixture only. The production no-custom-reward path is covered by ChainSpec/Alloy EVM reward code, but this exact EVM execution regression test is absent.
